programs.title: The Zimmern List
programs.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Andrew dines on cuisine from around the world; hedigs into a monster Mexican sandwich, samples some of New York's best Egyptian cuisine and feasts on Argentine meats and authentic Taiwanese fare.
